title: class-diagram-layout-plan
description: Logical layout for map-model class diagrams. Concept names match display names in map-model-spec.json (child segment when using Base:Subtype). No pixel coordinates — the emitter assigns geometry.

label.description: Optional human label; not used by the emitter today.

members.description: Concept names in display order within the cluster.

cluster_order.description: Cluster ids along the primary axis. Clusters omitted here are appended in declaration order.

orientation.description: clusters_horizontal: clusters laid out left-to-right. clusters_vertical: clusters stacked top-to-bottom.

within_cluster.description: row: members in a horizontal line inside the cluster. column: members stacked vertically.
